description_long: This is a rustic wooden handcart with a rectangular cargo bed constructed from horizontal wooden planks. The cart features two large spoked wooden wheels mounted on either side, providing stability and mobility. At the front, two long, straight wooden handles extend outward, designed for manual pulling or pushing. The sides and rear of the cargo bed are enclosed with vertical wooden panels, forming a shallow box to contain items. The overall finish is matte, with visible wood grain and a slightly weathered appearance. The cart is utilitarian, suitable for transporting goods or materials in an urban or park setting.
description: A wooden handcart with a plank cargo bed, two large spoked wheels, and long straight handles for manual transport. The sides and rear are enclosed with wooden panels.
description_view_0: Front view showing the open cargo bed, straight handles extending forward, and the side panels enclosing the bed.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the large spoked wheel, the length of the handles, and the depth of the cargo bed.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the closed back panel and the symmetry of the side panels and wheels.
description_view_3: Opposite side view similar to view 1, showing the wheel and the structure of the cargo bed and handles.
